author: paras@getbindu.com
name: news-agent
description: The news-agents project represents a sophisticated implementation of terminal-based multi-agent coordination for news aggregation. Its architecture demonstrates innovative use of tmux for visual agent management, MCP for tool integration, and template-driven content generation. The codebase is well-structured, comprehensively documented, and serves as an excellent reference for building distributed agent systems using modern AI tools and terminal technologies.

environment_variables.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM calls
Mem0 API key for memory operations
